name: small accounting firms processing 5–15 clients/month tool
description: For small accounting firms processing 5–15 clients/month, inefficient preparation causes late financial reporting. We automate the preparation of monthly financial statements instead of manual preparation using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: inefficient preparation of monthly financial statements
